sequence.name: public_dashboard_cockpit
sequence.when: Start here so the user-facing dashboard is proven before deeper backend checks.
sequence.continue_if: Public root and v2-preview dashboard HTML/JSON are fresh, matching, and show operator attention, notification state, n8n budget, market clock, and first command.
sequence.stop_if: Public dashboard is stale, unreachable, missing operator evidence, or notification state is inconsistent.

sequence.name: standby_packet
sequence.when: Start here Monday pre-open or during live standby.
sequence.continue_if: Status is PASS/WATCH and next_action is continue_bounded_observation.
sequence.stop_if: Status is FAIL, live IBKR port is open, approval boundary fails, or next_action is unclear.

sequence.name: bounded_observation
sequence.when: Use when the standby packet says normal observation is the next safe action.
sequence.stop_if: Any hard failure, accounting drift, stale dashboard data, or unexpected workflow/broker/X mutation.

sequence.name: publish_dashboard
sequence.when: Run immediately after bounded observation so the user's public cockpit reflects the latest backend evidence.
sequence.continue_if: Publisher exits cleanly, all dashboard JSON locations sync, and public dashboard data remains fresh.
sequence.stop_if: Publisher fails, JSON keys are missing, dashboard data is stale, or public/root/v2-preview artifacts diverge.

sequence.name: monday_live_proof_check
sequence.when: Run after publisher refresh to prove the System Health Monday Live Proof panel is safe and internally consistent.
sequence.continue_if: Proof status is WAITING, WATCH, or PASS with no hard failures and safety flags clean.
sequence.stop_if: Proof status is FAIL, count math breaks, safety flags change, or hard failures appear.

sequence.name: ibkr_paper_preflight
sequence.when: Use only if paper brokerage evidence is needed.
sequence.continue_if: Paper port 4002 or 7497 is open, account DUQ523641 is confirmed, and live ports 4001/7496 are closed.
sequence.stop_if: Any live port is open, paper account is not DUQ523641, or paper connection fails.

sequence.name: stock_expansion_preflight_bundle
sequence.when: Use before any stock book expansion discussion.
sequence.continue_if: Bundle reports fixture_suite=PASS, hard_failures=[], stock_expansion_allowed=false unless every gate and exact approval are present.
sequence.stop_if: Any hard failure, failed contract check, broker-order allowance, live-port issue, or expansion allowed without an exact approved packet. Contract: python3 foundation_v2/v2_stock_expansion_preflight_bundle_check.py --execute

sequence.name: current_day_candidate
sequence.when: Use before any paper mirror discussion.
sequence.continue_if: A current-day candidate is eligible and the packet still reports broker_order=not placed.
sequence.stop_if: No eligible candidate exists, candidate is stale, or any protected-surface check fails.

sequence.name: paper_order_approval_packet
sequence.when: Use only after Steps 1-8 are clean and a single current-day candidate is ready.
sequence.continue_if: User provides the exact paper approval phrase in this primary chat.
sequence.stop_if: Approval phrase is absent, approximate, scoped to more than one trade, or mentions live brokerage.
sequence.approval_required: I approve one IBKR paper mirror test on DUQ523641 only.

sequence.name: mirror_sql_review_packet
sequence.when: Use only after a paper fill exists and has been reported.
sequence.continue_if: User provides the separate exact mirror SQL approval phrase for that one trade.
sequence.stop_if: Paper fill evidence is missing or the user has not approved the mirror SQL separately.
sequence.approval_required: I approve applying the IBKR paper mirror SQL for trade [id] only.

sequence.name: scheduler_status_check
sequence.when: Use when considering, verifying, or refusing scheduler install/load.
sequence.continue_if: activation_allowed=false unless the exact scheduler approval phrase is present.
sequence.stop_if: Any scheduler is installed/loaded unexpectedly or approval text is not exact.
sequence.approval_required: I approve installing the Monday safe observation scheduler only.
